title: CRISIS PREGNANCY HOTLINE - 211info
text: NATIONAL SAFE HAVEN ALLIANCE CRISIS PREGNANCY HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The National Safe Haven Alliance (NSHA) is a national non-profit organization that promotes safe alternatives for parents in crisis pregnancy situations. The crisis hotline provides support and direction for parents and providers regarding the Safe Haven law, including Safe Surrender locations, adoption resources and parenting support. Also, it provides direct resources to assist and prevent infant abandonment. The hotline is staffed by social workers, nurses, and paramedics that have received comprehensive training and are able to support, and assist parents and providers. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (888) 510-2229 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 510-2229 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Crisis Pregnancy Hotlines Safe Havens for Abandoned Newborns If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL SAFE HAVEN ALLIANCE
